goal: 让 agent-memory status 直接暴露 full pipeline 失败步骤

summary.title: 暴露 full pipeline 失败步骤
summary.what: agent-memory status 现在会在 full pipeline 失败时保存 lastFailure，并在后续 throttled heartbeat 覆盖状态后，从 runtime runs JSONL 按同一 lastFullPipelineAt 只读恢复失败步骤；diagnostics 输出 full_pipeline_step_failed warning。
summary.why: 长期推进 Catty v0 依赖 live runtime truth。当前 runtime unhealthy 时如果 diagnostics 只有泛化失败或空 warnings，下一轮 agent 容易误判；直接暴露 dream 超时等失败步骤能缩短诊断路径。
summary.user_goal: 让 agent-memory status 直接暴露 full pipeline 失败步骤

decisions.chose: 在 fullPipeline.lastFailure 中保存首个关键 full pipeline 失败步骤，并在 throttled runs 里继承
decisions.rationale: 轻量 heartbeat 会覆盖 canonical status 的 steps；把失败摘要放在 fullPipeline 上能跨 run 保留根因。
rejected: 只在 diagnostics 中即时计算，因为 throttled status 已经没有原始失败 step

decisions.chose: status 输出时只读扫描当天 runtime runs JSONL，按 lastFinishedAt 找回同一 full pipeline 的失败步骤
decisions.rationale: 可以解释本轮之前已经发生、但 canonical status 后来被 throttled heartbeat 覆盖的失败；不改写 status.json。

rejected.alternative: 本轮直接修复 dream timeout
rejected.reason: 当前切片目标是降低运行态诊断盲点；dream timeout 根因可能涉及模型、网络或上下文长度，应另起更窄诊断切片。

review_notes: 提交 5f0584b 只包含 src/ops.ts、src/ops-status-live.test.ts、src/lib/ops-runtime.ts、src/lib/ops-runtime.test.ts；CLAUDE.md 是无关 dirty，未 stage/commit。
验证：bun test src/ops-status-live.test.ts src/lib/ops-runtime.test.ts；bun test；git diff --check；git diff --cached --check；bun src/ops.ts status --json --live。
live status 仍 needsAttention=true；当前根因为 full pipeline 的 dream step timeout，下一轮应排查 agent-memory dream 60s 超时。
Catty dogfood-health 仍 blocked/no_user_prior_candidates，sampleGate=wait_for_context_switch，shadow=samplingFreshness repeated-context；未写 Pi sample。

architectural_claims: Status diagnostics may recover read-only failure evidence from runtime run logs when canonical status has been overwritten by throttled heartbeat state.
behavioral_changes: ops status diagnostics now emits full_pipeline_step_failed when a critical full pipeline step failed.
fullPipeline carries optional lastFailure across throttled runs.
status --json/--live can recover missing lastFailure from the matching runtime JSONL run without writing status files.

data_model_changes.name: fullPipeline.lastFailure
data_model_changes.migration_notes: Optional field; older status files remain readable and status can recover the field from runtime JSONL run logs.

security_implications: No secrets are read; recovery uses existing runtime status JSON and runtime JSONL run logs.
